title: Roster descriptions and display improvements
description: You can now edit your roster descriptions as markdown and rosters now show their description and their portrait (or the killteam's portrait) in the background.

title: V4 is LIVE!
description: V4 is now LIVE! If you need access to the old KTDash (for kt21 teams for example), go to [old.ktdash.app](https://old.ktdash.app).

title: Persistent Ploys, Roster Share Menu, UI tweaks
description: Added support for selecting active ploys! They automatically clear when moving to a new Turn or resetting the roster. Added a new "Share" menu on your rosters (including QR code and roster link). Also a bunch of UI tweaks for ease of use.

title: Select operatives (Deploy/reserve)
description: Added support for selecting Operatives to deploy! The menu now has an option to "Deploy" or "Reserve" your operatives. Reserve operatives are collapsed and pushed to the bottom of the roster view in their own section.

title: Crit/Tac/Kill Ops
description: You can now select and track your CritOps, TacOps, and KillOps on your roster.

title: Jul 2025 Balance Dataslate
description: All July 2025 balance dataslate updates have been applied.

title: Fixes
description: Add universal equipment + lots of fixes throughout including Killteam composition, missing or incorrect weapon rules, and others.

title: Killteam Page Updates, auto-apply mods
description: Added killteam composition, equipment, and ploys to the killteam pages. Added support for mods on weapons and operatives (e.g. Mark of Chaos or Custom Bolt Carbine).
